title: erysimum arkansanum
intro: Erysimum arkansanum, also known as Arkansas wickup or Arkansas wallflower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the genus Erysimum. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Erysimum arkansanum include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote tissue healing, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and antimicrobial agent. Erysimum arkansanum is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and can be used topically to treat various skin conditions and wounds.
